summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Beat 515 radio station app admin panel routing fix and overall functionality. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all sections
Admin panel loads at /admin with correct data-testid='admin-page'
Admin panel tabs (stats, users, requests, create news) all visible and functional
Admin stats display correctly (total users: 6, total news, total requests, pending requests)
Admin users table loads with 6 user rows
Admin requests management accessible with approve/reject functionality
Admin create news form has all required elements
DJ limited admin access working correctly (only requests tab visible)
DJ can access and manage requests with approve/reject buttons
Profile page loads correctly for both admin and DJ users
Admin panel routing fix successful - no redirect to / before auth loads
Loading state checks implemented correctly in Admin, Login, and Profile pages
